app.name: Manasitra
app.tagline: Mann Ka Mitra — Companion of the Mind

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Manasitra is your private, anonymous companion. No login. No judgment. Just support.
onboarding.privacy_summary: We don't know your name. We don't store your chats. Everything stays on your device.
onboarding.disclaimer: Manasitra is an AI companion, not a mental health professional. If you are in crisis, please contact a qualified counselor or helpline.

chat.placeholder: Tell me what's on your mind...
chat.error_ai: I'm having trouble connecting, but I'm here for you.

games.title: Calming Tools
games.subtitle: Take a moment for yourself
games.breathing_desc: Guided breathing to calm your mind
games.puzzle_desc: A simple puzzle to reset focus
games.word_reset_desc: Clear your mind with positive words
games.gratitude_desc: Reflect on things you're thankful for

crisis.headline: You don't have to face this alone
crisis.subtext: Trained counselors are available right now. Reaching out is a sign of strength.
crisis.i_am_safe: I'm safe, I want to continue
crisis.talk_to_someone: Would it help to talk to someone trained for this?

privacy.title: Your Privacy
privacy.stored_label: What is stored on your device
privacy.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
privacy.promise: Manasitra does not know your name. It does not remember your conversations after you leave. Your mood logs stay on your device only. You can delete everything with one tap. This is your space.

errors.network: No internet connection. Some features may be limited.
errors.ai_unavailable: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Here's something that might help...
errors.storage_full: Your session will not be saved on this device.

a11y.quick_exit: Quick exit — clear session and return to home
